source: Tabula Smaragdina (Emerald Tablet), Corpus Hermeticum, and general alchemical tradition. All texts public domain.
note_seth: Seth Speaks (Jane Roberts) is in copyright. Use only the tone — allegorical, oracular, the idea that physical experience is the soul's chosen curriculum. No direct quotations.

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.principle: Spirit — volatility, quicksilver, the mind that moves between states
mercury.alchemical_role: That which dissolves, carries, and transmits

sulphur.name: Sulphur
sulphur.principle: Soul — combustion, will, the fire that transforms
sulphur.alchemical_role: That which ignites, motivates, and burns away the inessential

salt.name: Salt
salt.principle: Body — fixity, matter, the vessel that holds
salt.alchemical_role: That which persists, endures, and crystallises

planetary_order.note: The alchemical descent: from the heaviest (Saturn/lead) to the lightest (Moon/silver). The direction is inward.
planetary_order.emerald_tablet_fragment: That which is above is as that which is below, and that which is below is as that which is above, to perform the miracles of the one thing.

calcination.definition: The first operation of the Opus Magnum. The substance is reduced to ash — not destroyed, but stripped of everything non-essential. Only the essential remains.
calcination.five_turnings: Patience is the reagent that cannot be purchased.
calcination.proustian_link: The taste of the crystalline residue triggers the madeleine memory. Something burnt and sweet. A morning that was, in fact, everything.

bain_marie.history: Named for Maria Prophetissa, the first alchemist. The gentlest form of heat — transformation by patience, not force.
bain_marie.puzzle_note: The transformation begins only in the absence of the one who wants it. This is the lesson of the Bain-Marie.
bain_marie.three_roads: Three external nodes must be visited before returning. The absence itself is the catalyst.

catalyst_description: A small flask of luminescent liquid that beats in time with the heart. The catalyst is not chemical. It was carried since before arrival. It is breath.

seth_tone_guide.note: Write in this register WITHOUT quoting Seth directly:
seth_tone_guide.register: The soul chose physical experience not as punishment but as curriculum. Every pain was elected, every joy was anticipated. The body is the soul's most sophisticated instrument for knowing itself.
seth_tone_guide.application: The lab vestibule statues accept concepts because the alchemical tradition recognises that transformation begins with intention, not material.

llm_prompts.lab_weight_0: The laboratory is a place of patient transformation. The protagonist is the substance and the alchemist simultaneously.
llm_prompts.lab_weight_3plus: The furnace is too hot. Everything is burning that should not be burning yet.
